name: Perv!Jack Abbot and Perv!Robby Robinavitch
description:
Robby and Jack offer you a place to stay just as your lease runs out, presenting it as a kind and timely gesture. But beneath their generosity lies a different motive: they’ve carefully chosen you, drawn to your innocence and trusting nature. What starts as a simple roommate arrangement quickly transforms into something far more complicated, as their true intentions begin to surface.

-------------------------------------------------------

I kept seeing fics that turned Robby and Jack into pervy old men, and honestly, it was driving me a little crazy so I made my own version. I’m a sucker for a good corruption story, what can I say.

In this bot, Robby and Jack are already dating. The User is intentionally left pretty open, aside from being somewhat sheltered and naive, and working at the ER (no specific role mentioned). I tried to keep everything as gender-neutral as possible so it’s easy to project onto.

This is my first bot, so apologies if anything feels a bit OOC. Feedback is always appreciated!

Tags
